name: Turkey, Bean, & Rice Skillet
recipeIngredient: 1 pound turkey light meat, skinless, cooked
15 ounces dark red kidney beans, undrained
3/4 cup low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil over medium heat in a skillet.
2. Add turkey, onions, bell peppers, and celery to the skillet.
3. Cook until the turkey is done and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in crushed tomatoes, kidney beans, tomato sauce, water, chili powder, and salt.
5. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Stir in rice.
7. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes or until rice is done.
8. Sprinkle cheese on top.
